tasks.label: Visual question answering
tasks.notes: Android should call the Qualcomm SmolVLM runtime directly with camera frames and text prompts. The Flask/Python path is development-only.

tasks.label: Scene description
tasks.notes: Uses the same Qualcomm SmolVLM artifact set as visual question answering.

tasks.label: Memory text embeddings
tasks.notes: SmolVLM does not currently replace the previous InternVL-specific embedding export path. Save/retrieval should stay local and lightweight until a separate Qualcomm-friendly embedding model is chosen.

tasks.label: Speech to text
tasks.notes: Push-to-talk should use this runtime when the Whisper QNN artifact is present. Text input remains the safe local fallback.

tasks.label: Text to speech
tasks.notes: Piper is CPU/local audio, not QNN. Spoken output is optional; text response must always work.

tasks.label: Visual memory retrieval
tasks.notes: Current Python prototype uses CLIP + FAISS. Android should either package a supported embedding model or fall back to text retrieval until measured.
